_comment: Hero skills mirrored out to focused standalone repos by scripts/sync_hero_skill.py. medsci-skills is the single source of truth; each standalone repo is a GENERATED mirror (skill copied verbatim + generated README/LICENSE/CITATION/marketplace/installer). Add an entry to mirror another skill; the sync script + .github/workflows/mirror-hero-skills.yml pick it up.

hero_skills.tagline: Catch fabricated and mismatched citations before peer review — audit-only reference verification against PubMed and CrossRef.
